title: paracarphalea kirondron
side_effects: Paracarphalea kirondron can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use of the plant may lead to kidney damage and increased blood pressure, which can result in cardiovascular problems. Additionally, improper preparation or dosage of Paracarphalea kirondron may cause stomach ulcers, nausea, and vomiting. In extreme cases, excessive consumption of the plant may cause seizures, coma, or even death.
